perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two women sitting on a white sofa; the younger woman is hugging the older woman warmly. (2) A pink title card with floral accents appears with the text 'MOTHER'S DAY'. (3) The older woman begins a monologue while the younger woman sits beside her wearing headphones, occasionally smiling or reacting. (4) Chronological inset images appear above them, showing the daughter as a child, her family, her graduation, and her work life. (5) Transition screens introduce new topics with stylized text. (6) The video concludes with the two women hugging and laughing together on the sofa.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Soft, upbeat acoustic music with a light piano and guitar melody begins and continues throughout the video. (2) A middle-aged female voice speaks in a warm, narrative, and slightly emotional tone, describing her daughter's life journey. (3) Occasional laughter from both women is heard. (4) Subtle sound effects like chimes or soft 'whooshes' occur during scene transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'MOTHER'S DAY' appears at the start. (2) Hook Text: 'What has changed about Er Bo since she was young?' introduces the first segment. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles throughout the video translate the mother's spoken Chinese, covering topics like Er Bo's career choices and family values. (4) Decorative Text: Large topic headers like 'When Er Bo started her business' and 'Er Bo's caring side' mark narrative shifts. (5) Closing Text: 'Happy Mother's Day to all mothers in the world'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Thematic Interview segments with visual aids -> Emotional Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female characters are seated on a sofa; other people appear only in static inset photos.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An older woman with short brown hair wearing a black polka-dot accented shirt, and a younger woman with long dark hair in a matching black dress with colorful polka-dot patterns.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor setting featuring a clean white wall and a white leather sofa.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Question-led retrospection -> Emotional blessing -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To celebrate Mother's Day by showcasing a heartfelt testimonial from a mother about her daughter's growth and character, serving as both personal content and brand building for 'HAHA BABY'.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Both characters are wearing clothing with the 'HAHA BABY' signature polka-dot design, which is the daughter's brand.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Colorful polka-dot clothing and the use of the name 'Er Bo' (二伯).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-quality interview format typical of professional influencers in the Taiwan region.
